message:
I am thinking...: 
Great progress! Synthesis is advancing:
1. The drain log is now at 59068 lines (was 52364)
2. The last lines show `u_core.u_cpu.core.regs.raddr2 [4] -> $\u_core.u_cpu.core.regs.real_dualport_noreset.mem$rdreg[0]$d` - this is the ABC optimization pass connecting register file read address signals. This is the technology mapping phase (abc).
3. `AREA_0.abc` file was just created at 10:29 - this is the ABC synthesis script being created, which means Yosys is about to run ABC for technology mapping
4. The `reports` directory has been updated at 10:29 - synthesis is generating reports

This is significant progress! Yosys has completed the analysis phase and is now in the ABC technology mapping phase. This is typically the fastest part. After ABC, Yosys will write the output netlist.

I'm optimistic that synthesis will complete within the next 10-30 minutes. Let me continue monitoring.
